metadata.description: Custom Claude Code skills for finance, data visualization, and AI image generation. Tuned for investment research and enterprise-grade output.

plugins.name: nano-banana
plugins.description: AI image generation using Gemini 3.1 Flash, tuned for finance and investment research. Produces enterprise-grade infographics with white backgrounds, restrained typography, and clean minimalist aesthetics suitable for research PDFs and board presentations.

plugins.name: d3-viz
plugins.description: Interactive data visualizations using D3.js v7. Comprehensive skill for creating charts, graphs, network diagrams, and geographic visualizations with fine-grained control over SVG elements, transitions, and interactions.

plugins.name: samaritan-memory
plugins.description: Hybrid memory system combining Qdrant semantic vector search with Neo4j knowledge graph, powered by Qwen3-VL embeddings and reranking. Skills for recall, search, ingest, book ingestion, graph queries, and system diagnostics.

plugins.name: investment-analyst
plugins.description: End-to-end investment credit analysis pipeline. Automates research provider access (JPM, CapitalIQ, Fitch, CreditSights, Morgan Stanley), document collection, fundamental research with FRED macro data, 7-sheet Excel financial models with credit scoring, D3 charts, nano-banana infographics, and DOCX report generation with SBC Treasury branding.
